title: PyPack
description: Immersive (shaders/sounds/3D things) pack that's easy to start with (deploy starter base & vein mining), but deep to master (automation), including extra tools, aircraft, foods, mobs, etc. Easily invite others to your single player world.
body:
This pack started where we, as a bunch of Python students, played the "[Kuriboh's Family Server Pack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/kuribohs-family-server-pack)", but quickly wanted to make many changes of our own while keeping everyone synchronised for each playing session.
Features:
|

🧑‍🤝‍🧑Multiplayer🧑‍🤝‍🧑

| | :-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------: | | 🧑‍🤝‍🧑Inviting others: Open your world to LAN, then a new (different every time) server address will be generated for you into your chat.

🧑‍🤝‍🧑Dad jokes on world load. :)

🧑‍🤝‍🧑50% Players sleep requirement.

🧑‍🤝‍🧑Ping Wheel

🧑‍🤝‍🧑Instanced loot chests | |

🧗Movement🧗

| | :----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------: | | 🧗You can climb up to 3 blocks (press and release shift (sneak) while jumping to a ledge to hold on and pull yourself up.)

🧗You can jump over fences & walls

🧗Faster ladders!

🧗Icarus Elytras

🧗Crawl and sit | |

🌳World Generation🌳

| | :----------------------------------------------------------------------------: | | 🌳Terralith

🌳Explorify

🌳Waystones

🌳Minimap & World Map | |

🌱Farming and Food🌱

| | :--------------------------------------: | | 🍔Döner Kebabs

🍔Farmer's Delight | |

👓Visual👓

| | :-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------: | | 👓Distant Horizons will grant you distant terrain vision

👓Sound, weather, animation and graphic upgrades

👓Zoom (default key = "V")

👓Colored Tooltips

👓Suspicious Sand/Gravel look "sus", like the should.

👓Dynamic Crosshair

👓Beautiful Enchanted Books | |

📟Technology📟

| | :---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------: | | 📟Moving Elevators

📟Immersive Aircraft

📟Modular Routers

📟Redstone Pen

📟LittleTiles

📟CC Tweaked

📟Integrated Dynamics, Terminals and Tunnels

📟Advanced Peripherals

📟Camera to take pictures for paintings | |

🏬Building🏬

| | :----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------: | | 🏬Prefab (Instantly deploy buildings)

🏬Stoneworks

🏬Chunk Loaders

🏬Supplementaries

🏬Chisel and Chipped

🏬Arts and Crafts

🏬Display Case

🏬Display pictures/videos from the internet, ingame. | |

🐷Mobs🐷

| | :--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------: | | 🐷Magnum torch to prevent spawns

🐷Better Babies

🐷Skeleton Physics

🐷Guard Villagers

🐷Easy Villagers & Piglins

🐷Variants and Ventures

🐷Luminous: Monsters

🐷Cannot harm any tamed pets, unless you attack while sneaking.

🐷Special boss music when fighting the Wither or Ender Dragon. | |

📦Storage📦

| | :------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------: | | 📦Click through signs & item frames

📦Sophisticated Backpacks & Storage

📦Chestpack Backpacks can move and carry chests in off-hand like a backpack

📦Sort button in inventory. (ideal when opening new chests)

📦Gravestone upon death

📦Trash Slot | |

🏹Tools, Weapons and Armory🏹

| | :---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------: | | 🏹Vein Mining (Liteminer)

🏹Better Combat

🏹Starter Kit

🏹Compasses to search biomes and structures.

🏹Artifacts & Relics

🏹Armor of the Ages

🏹Silent Gear

🏹Target Dummy for damage testing | |

💫Quality of life💫

| | :-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------: | | ⌨️Keybind bundles (radial select bind for multiple functions to a key)

🔠Languages can be instantly changed.

🔃Slot cycler (Alt + Scroll to cycle column in inventory)

❗Pick up notifier

💪Capture mobs with Lassos and pickup villagers (easy villagers)

⌨️Make in-game notes for each world or globally. |

Known issues: When setting up a server on Modrinth servers, you might need to manually install Inventory Tweaks Refoxed on the server side. (For some reason, this mod wasn't auto added to the server side when starting a new Modrinth server.)
